prompt: A sunlit indoor portrait of a blonde woman relaxing on a soft carpet beside a light-colored couch. She wears a matching blue lounge set with small pink details, smiling and winking playfully at the camera. Warm natural sunlight streams in, casting soft shadows across her face and body. A bowl of popcorn sits nearby, adding a casual, cozy vibe. The setting feels relaxed and intimate, with neutral tones and soft textures.
